ConstructorArguments: Set a material override for a material with a specific attribute set. For example, if you have a model with lots of different materials, but one of them has an attribute "skin" set to "1", then calling this with a material and "skin" will override only that material.

Documentation.Summary:
Set a material override for a material with a specific attribute set. For example, if you have a model with lots of different materials, but one of them has an attribute "skin" set to "1", then 
calling this with a material and "skin" will override only that material.
